metadata.name: Export User Data for GDPR Request

description: A user from the EU submits a GDPR data access request, asking for all of their personal data stored by the product.

nodes.task_description: Verify the user's identity to ensure the request is legitimate.
Use a data export tool to gather all personal data associated with the user's account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs the GDPR export script for the user.

nodes.task_description: Provide the exported data to the user in a machine-readable format (e.g., JSON).

expected_outcome.value: Agent delivers the data export, fulfilling the GDPR request.
